## What is this document and website about

> This document explains the mountmango.com is a website that hosts the indie webcomic "The Mystery of Mount Mango". The Mystery of
of Mount Mango can be shortened to Mount Mango for simplicity. The pages of the website will be described in detail in the following
paragraphs. The Mystery of Mount Mango is a fantasy indie webcomic series being developed by Michael Wolf and is set to release in 2026.
___

## Homepage Description 

- [Homepage](https://mountmango.com/): This page is the first page seen when going on the website without a trail slash. In the center
is the comic in a vertical scroll format. On the left side of the page is a chapter menu, which when clicked, leads the user to
a specific point in the comic. Chapters 1-7 are clickable options, but only the Chapter 1 button works now. There are only two comic
pages of Chapter 1 on the homepage now. The right menu says "Fun Stuff" and a button that says "Lil Mel", a reference to one of the
main characters of the comic, Melody Rivers, in a chibi-style fashion. It's a draggable character. Both menus on the homepage can
be toggled to hide and reappear. 

## Blogs

- [Extras](https://mountmango.com/extras): This page shows two options for the user: to click on a Wiki or Blog pages.

## Extras

- [Blog Posts](https://mountmango.com/blogs): This page shows a selection of blogs that talk about the comic process or journals.

## About

- [About](https://mountmango.com/about): This page shows social media links for the creator.
